phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada da gruta do túnel na praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH GROO-tuh DOO TOO-nihl NUH PREYEUH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o arco de rocha. Pergunte aos salva-vidas se tiver dúvidas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DIH RAW-shuh. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih UHOOSH SAHL-vuh-VEE-duhsh SIH tee-VEHR DOO-vee-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the rock arch. Ask the lifeguards if you have any doubts.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the rock arch. Ask the lifeguards if you have any doubts.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DIH RAW-shuh. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih UHOOSH SAHL-vuh-VEE-duhsh SIH tee-VEHR DOO-vee-duhsh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o arco de rocha. Pergunte aos salva-vidas se tiver dúvidas.

phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as escadas de madeira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH SHKAH-duhsh DIH muh-DAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Steep descent requires sturdy footwear and caution.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as escadas de madeira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH SHKAH-duhsh DIH muh-DAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the wooden stairs.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the wooden stairs.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH SHKAH-duhsh DIH muh-DAY-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para as escadas de madeira.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada para o túnel da gruta do mar?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh PUH-ruh AW TOO-nihl DUH GROO-tuh DOO MAHR?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o túnel da gruta do mar.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW TOO-nihl DUH GROO-tuh DOO MAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the sea cave tunnel.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the sea cave tunnel.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW TOO-nihl DUH GROO-tuh DOO MAHR.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o túnel da gruta do mar.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the sea cave tunnel?
phrases.text_local: Onde localizo o túnel da gruta marinha?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih loo-kuh-LEE-zoo AW TOO-nihl DUH GROO-tuh muh-REE-nyuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Access requires low tide and careful swimming.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o túnel da gruta marinha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW TOO-nihl DUH GROO-tuh muh-REE-nyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the sea cave tunnel.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the sea cave tunnel.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW TOO-nihl DUH GROO-tuh muh-REE-nyuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o túnel da gruta marinha.

phrases.text_local: Onde está o arco de rocha famoso?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW AH-ruh-koo DIH RAW-shuh fuh-MOH-zoo?
phrases.cultural_note: The natural rock formation is a protected geological landmark.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um salva-vidas onde fica o arco.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG SAHL-vuh-VEE-duhsh OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW AH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a lifeguard where the arch is.

responses.english: Ask a lifeguard where the arch is.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG SAHL-vuh-VEE-duhsh OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW AH-ruh-koo.
responses.local: Pergunte a um salva-vidas onde fica o arco.
